violations.text: The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue to clean any and all droppings using appropriate means of sanitizing. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

The door to the outside, located in the main entrance and storage room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

-One of two hand sinks were observed in poor repair. -3 door reach-in #3 was observed holding an ambient temperature of 62 DF and in poor repair. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Equipment must be in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings with appropriate means of sanitizing. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The door to the outside, located in the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The cutting boards in the prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

-One of two hand sinks were observed in poor repair. -The ice machine was observed not working properly and in poor repair. Establishment is not to use ice machine until service is made. -The prep unit was observed holding an ambient temperature of 57 DF and in poor repair. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Per PIC, service has been called for hand sink, prep unit, and ice machine. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrective Action - establishment is to continue to work with pest control, establishment is to clean all droppings along wall. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 Bay. Establishment is to obtain chlorine test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023
